{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Western Chi Ning City
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Western Chi Ning City]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
